seoTitle: Kelvin View vs Kenmare — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kelvin View and Kenmare. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kelvin View vs Kenmare: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kelvin View and Kenmare.
heading: Kelvin View vs Kenmare — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kelvin View, Victoria and Kenmare, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kelvin View has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Kenmare (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kelvin View or Kenmare safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kelvin View has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Kenmare scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kelvin View scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Kenmare scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kelvin View or Kenmare?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kelvin View has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
